0.details:
Loss of a beloved family pet
Written to a colleague (Megan) who loved their dog
Died of natural causes / old age
Dog was called Rover
Anecdote: she brought dog to work one day, it made a mess
0.model_generation:
Dear Megan,

I was so sorry to hear about Rover’s passing. He lived a long, happy life and filled your home with love and laughter. His loyalty and unwavering companionship was a true blessing. Losing such a faithful friend leaves a deep emptiness, and my heart goes out to you as you mourn his gentle spirit.

I will always remember the day you brought Rover to the office. Despite the little mess he made, his wagging tail and sweet eyes brought smiles to everyone and reminded us of the joy pets bring into our lives. His playful nature and kind presence touched all of us, and that happy memory will stay with me.

Please know I am here for you, whether you need someone to listen or share stories of Rover’s adventures. I hope that the love and memories you shared bring you comfort and peace in the days ahead.

With warmest sympathy,
0.final_version:
Hey Meg,

So sorry to hear about Rover. How are you holding up?

He lived a long, happy life and everyone who knew him fell in love. Of all the pooches, he was the waggliest - such a happy and caring guy.

Was just thinking about the time you brought him to the office - he chew through most of our meeting notes, but nobody was angry. Even the managers just ruffled his fur and said we could postpone the meeting!

Just know I am here for you, whether you need someone to talk to or even just to listen. I hope all the lovely memories bring you comfort and peace in the days ahead.

See you soon.

edits.removed: filled your home with love and laughter.
His loyalty and unwavering companionship was a true blessing. Losing such a faithful friend leaves a deep emptiness, and my heart goes out to you as you mourn his gentle spirit.

I will always remember the day you brought Rover to the office. Despite the little mess he made, his wagging tail and sweet eyes brought smiles to everyone and reminded us of the joy pets bring into our lives.
His playful nature and kind presence touched all of us, and that happy memory will stay with me.
isten or share stories of Rover’s adventure

likert.edit_type_other: Changing names to nicknames and making more colloquial

1.details:
Linked to an upcoming audition for a TV show
Significant other is a female, actress, partner of 10 years
She has been out of work for 3 years post giving birth
I want to help them pursue their goals in any way I can
1.model_generation: Hey love, with your big TV show audition coming up, I just want to remind you how incredible you are. The past three years of dedicating yourself to motherhood have deepened your empathy, resilience, and authenticity—all the qualities that make you a captivating actress. I’ve watched you balance every challenge with grace and determination, and I know you’ll bring that same passion to your performance. Trust in your training, trust in your instincts, and most of all, trust in yourself. You have the talent, the drive, and the heart to own every moment on that stage. No matter what happens, I’m so proud of you for chasing your dreams again. I’ll be right there beside you—cheering, listening, helping rehearse lines or running errands—whatever you need. You’ve got this, and I’ve got you, always. Go shine bright; the world is ready for you. I can’t wait to celebrate every step of this journey with you.
1.final_version:
Hey beautiful!

With the big audition coming up, I just wanted to remind you how incredible and talented you are; as an actor, a best friend, a partner and a mother. 

All of those qualities manifest in a spirit which make you perfect for the role. Trust in your training, trust in your instincts, go full steam ahead - this is your time. I’m so proud of you for chasing your dreams again, and I’ll be right next to you every step of the way - come what may.

You’ve got this - I’ve got you.

Love.

edits.removed: The past three years of dedicating yourself to motherhood have deepened your empathy, resilience, and authenticity
a captivating actress. I’ve watched you balance every challenge with grace and determination, and I know you’ll bring that same passion to your performance
and most of all, trust in yourself.
Go shine bright; the world is ready for you. I can’t wait to celebrate every step of this journey with you.

likert.edit_type_other: Making less formal through removal of overpunctuation

2.details:
Tribute to the local ggreengrocer
He has served local families for years
His name was Ted and he is survived by Margaret (92)
Warmhearted man who knew everuyone by name
Memory of him donating food to homeless
2.model_generation:
Today we gather to celebrate the life of Ted, our beloved local greengrocer, who for decades has nurtured our families with fresh produce and an ever-present smile. Ted’s welcoming voice greeted each customer by name, turning errands into moments of connection. He and his devoted wife Margaret, now 92, shared a love that brightened every aisle of his market and every corner of our community.

Beyond running a thriving shop, Ted’s compassion led him to quietly donate surplus fruits and vegetables to those in need, ensuring that no one in our neighborhood went hungry. His generosity and warmth uplifted countless lives and set a shining example of kindness.

Though Ted is no longer with us, his spirit lives on in the laughter that echoed through his shop, the friendships he cultivated, and the legacy of care he leaves behind. May we honor Ted by following his example of service, compassion, and unwavering goodwill.
2.final_version:
Loved ones in attendance. 

I want to talk to you about Ted.

For decades, this man has worked tirelessly to bring fresh produce to our community, served with an ever-present smile (unless Chelsea had lost). 

In his booming voice, he greeted each customer by name, turning our simple errands into moments of connection. Beyond running a thriving shop, Ted’s compassion led him to quietly donate surplus fruits and vegetables to those in need, ensuring that no one in our area went hungry. His generosity and warmth uplifted countless lives and set a shining example of kindness.

And now that warmth is survived by dearest Margaret.... Please know, the community stands beside you always.

Though Ted is no longer with us, his spirit lives on in the laughter that echoed through his shop, the friendships he cultivated, and the legacy of care he leaves behind. May we honour Ted by following his example of service, compassion, and unwavering goodwill.

edits.removed: Today we gather to celebrate the life of
He and his devoted wife Margaret, now 92, shared a love that brightened every aisle of his market and every corner of our community.
And now his warmth which is survived by our dearest Margaret.

3.details:
Birthday of partner, Annie (26)
She works as a model and adult film actress
She takes pride in her work and makes no apologies
Funny anecdote: she was in a relationship when we met, and our relationship started as an affair
3.model_generation: Happy birthday, Annie! Today we celebrate you: your confidence, your unapologetic joy, and your unstoppable drive. When we first met, you were in a relationship, yet from that very first stolen moment, something electric sparked. We both knew we were diving into uncharted waters—and I’m still grateful every day that we did. Watching you walk on set with that perfect blend of professionalism and playfulness fills me with pride. You embrace every role you take on, modeling with elegance and performing with passion—never apologizing for who you are. At 26, you’ve shown me what it means to live boldly and love deeply. You turn heads with your beauty, but it’s your kindness, your laughter, and your unwavering spirit that captivate me most. Here’s to you, Annie—happy birthday! May this year bring you bold new roles, lasting memories, and the deep satisfaction you deserve. I can’t wait to cheer you on through every chapter.
3.final_version:
Beautiful Annie.

Today we are all here to celebrate - not just your birthday, but your confidence, your unapologetic radiance, and your unstoppable drive. 

I'm not supposed to mention this but... When we first met, Annie was in a relationship. Yes, I know.... But we were meant for each other, and we wasted no time igniting a spark... And I’m still grateful every day that we did, because that spark has never faltered.

The way you captivate a room, with that perfect blend of elegance and playfulness fills me with pride. At work, you embrace every role you take on, performing with a passion which will take you to the top of your field. At home. you’ve shown me what it means to live boldly and love deeply. You turn heads with your beauty, but it’s your kindness, your laughter, and your unwavering spirit that captivate me most. 

Here’s to you, my girl. Happy birthday! May this year bring you the lasting memories and the deep satisfaction you deserve.

edits.removed: yet from that very first stolen moment,
We both knew we were diving into uncharted waters—
I can’t wait to cheer you on through every chapter.

4.details:
Friend wrote a reference for my girlfriend who was applying for a job
They falsified information
She got the job
I'm thankful, and we pull stunts like this all the time
4.model_generation:
Dear Alex,

I can’t thank you enough for the amazing reference you wrote on Morgan’s behalf. Your willingness to color outside the lines and embellish her qualifications was exactly what she needed. When she called me last week to say she’d been offered the position, I knew your creative spin had sealed the deal. We both know that a little harmless bending of the truth is part of our playbook, and you delivered spectacularly. Morgan is thrilled, and I’m equally grateful. From orchestrating last-minute rescue missions to pulling off audacious capers, we make quite the dynamic team. Your generosity in stepping up at a moment’s notice means more than words can express. I owe you one big time, and I look forward to celebrating soon. Thanks again for having our back and turning this stunt into a success story.

Warmest thanks,
Cheers, Chris
4.final_version:
Karl!

Top work on that reference - it was exactly what was needed and... she got the job! Another classic scam executed by the Pepper Boyz! This is even better than the time we got the radio station to believe we were the surviving members of S Club 7!...

If you do get a call from the reference company, just stick to the information on the e-mail I sent you. Try to be very vague with details beyond that. TBH I doubt there will be any more follow-up; it's not worth their time. 

Hope you're doing well, and that we can catch up for a drink soon - first one is on me. Can't wait to hear how the trip to Colombia went - maybe wait until the kids have gone to bed before getting into that one though!

Tell Megan we're missing her, and that Annie sends her love.

Love you, bro.

edits.removed: one two three four five six seven eight n n n n n n n n nn n n n n n

5.details:
Apology to a friend whose car I smashed
I borrowed it to buy a bottle of coke because I was thirsty
I had promised to drive carefully
I can't pay for repairs. I hope that's ok?
I will, in turn, not tell your wife about your work romance with Emily
5.model_generation:
Dear friend,

I need to apologize for smashing your car yesterday. I borrowed it to buy a Coke because I was thirsty, and I promised I’d drive carefully. I lost focus for a moment, and the accident happened. I feel terrible for breaking your trust and damaging something important to you.

I wish I could cover the repair costs, but I’m not in a position to pay for them. I realize this puts you in a difficult position and I’m truly sorry. I hope you can understand and forgive me. To make things right, I want to help in any way I can—running errands, carpooling, or fixing lunches until it’s sorted.

Also, I promise I won’t say a word to your wife about you and Emily. I value our friendship too much to let this slip-up ruin everything between us.

Sincerely,  
your friend
5.final_version:
Dude, first of - I'm sorry about your car.

I've had time to think about this, and I feel so guilty. I know it's not looking great right now, and I did some checks - there's no way I can afford that type of money.

So how about this? You let me off with not paying for the repairs, and in return I won't tell Lana about what you and Emily have going on. It's not a blackmail thing at all, I just want to make sure we both get something out of the situation. You know I can keep the secret.

I feel so stupid, crashing a car because I was rushing to buy a Cherry Coke, but I've spent some time meditating and reading through my affirmations and am now able to forgive myself. I hope one day you will be able to forgive yourself too.

But Lana - she would never forget.

Let me know how to proceed boss.

post_survey.present_other: Relationship strength with other person. Warmth. Playfulness (depending on tone). Sarcasm.
